Big “Needle Movers” In A Funnel
Remember: Your biggest needle movers are gonna be at the FRONT of the funnel
Making changes to “Upsell 2” aren’t going to have as big of an impact, as changing the sales
letter.
Top 4 things I test (assuming the offer is already correct, i.e. it’s something people really want)
- The ads that get people to the sales page
- The lead on the sales page
- The price/offer on the sales page (price, quantity, silver/gold, trial
- First upsell and the downsell with it
Ads
Ads die. And once they die, it’s easy to think that you need a new offer. Or that you need a
totally new sales page. That’s not usually the case. You just need new ads.
Angles to test on ads
- Emotional story -
- Contrarian angle
- Curiosity/shock angle
- Timely news story (who or what is on their mind?)
- Proof angle
- Direct offer (for f+s offers)
Email
1. First test - New subject lines
- “From name” tests (if to your own list or for affiliates)
- negative connotation - “Avoid eggs”
- high blood pressure, dangerous blood pressure
John Smith - don’t eat eggs
Avoid eggs - why eggs make you gain weight
- “Subject line” -
- testing short vs long
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 1 of 4 --

- smelly poop vs. what your poop says about your gut health
A note on subject lines - similar to headlines, you want to hit on as many of these as possible in
your subject line
- Curiousity (biggest one)
- proof/credibility
- Emotional story
- Timely news angle
- Contrarian
Examples…
Why hispanic women should AVOID keto
- Curiousity and contrarian
[FDA Alert] 4 WAYS TO IDENTIFY FAKE CBD
- Curiousity, proof, contrarian
BEWARE: Our 1st Socialist President is on the brink of being
elected…
- Curiousity, timely news
This ad has made me $1k/day for 3 years…
- Curiousity, credibility (specifics)
Retire rich with just 3 stocks?
- Curiousity
2. New hooks/stories
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 2 of 4 --

Big Needle Movers
--Price Tests--
Pricing
F+S offers - $6.95, $7.95, $9.95 etc…
Ebooks - $27, $10, $20
Physical - $29.95, $39.95, $49.95, $67 etc…
---Offer Structure and Quantity Tests ---
- Basic/Premium version of something
- Basic - Apple Cider Vinegar book ($9)
- Premium - Apple Cider Vinegar book, Dvd, Audiobook ($19)
- Quantity tests
- supplements, 1-3-6, 1-3-5, 1-2-4
- solar phone chargers 1-2-4
- 1 year subscription, 2 year subscription
- monthly subscription, discount for yearly (more upfront AOV)
- Digital/Physical option - Emily Lark, Hip Flexor Offer
- 1-pay vs installment plans
● $497 upfront
● 5 payments of $99
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 3 of 4 --

- Special Discount - Senior discount, August Discount (F+S offers)
- show the difference on checkout page
- i.e.
● Regular price $14.95
● SPECIAL Senior Discount $9.95
(If you are over the age of 55, you qualify for the special senior discount)
Note: could also do this as a special “August” discount - special women’s
discount, special military discount etc...
- Raise your price, but change to free shipping
- $49.95 + 8.95 S&H
- $59.95 w/free shipping (free shipping is a known big needle mover
in direct response)
- Dummy offer (Agora) Another Agora offer
- can do Dummy offer on basic/premium as well
- i.e. $9 Apple Cider Vinegar Book
$9 Apple Cider Vinegar Book + Audio Book + Videos
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 4 of 4 --
